title: Protect places of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural significance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Protect places of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural significance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and communicate with key stakeholders

pcs.text: Identify appropriate persons within local communities who hold cultural knowledge relevant in determining the cultural significance of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander places and heritage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify appropriate persons within local communities who hold cultural knowledge relevant in determining the cultural significance of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander places and heritage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify appropriate persons within local communities who hold cultural knowledge relevant in determining the cultural significance of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander places and heritage.

pcs.text: Develop working relationships with key stakeholders that assist in the management of culturally significant places
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop working relationships with key stakeholders that assist in the management of culturally significant places?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop working relationships with key stakeholders that assist in the management of culturally significant places.

pcs.text: Develop communication approaches that place Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and values at the forefront and accommodate stakeholder concerns and interests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop communication approaches that place Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and values at the forefront and accommodate stakeholder concerns and interests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop communication approaches that place Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols and values at the forefront and accommodate stakeholder concerns and interests.

pcs.text: Seek permission to document and obtain views on the way in which the cultural significance and resource can be conserved and used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek permission to document and obtain views on the way in which the cultural significance and resource can be conserved and used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek permission to document and obtain views on the way in which the cultural significance and resource can be conserved and used.

pcs.text: Report feedback to management for operational planning processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report feedback to management for operational planning processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report feedback to management for operational planning processes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify and communicate with key stakeholders

elements.title: Investigate cultural significance

pcs.text: Ensure cultural Knowledge Holders inform the decision-making process to determine the cultural significance of places
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure cultural Knowledge Holders inform the decision-making process to determine the cultural significance of places?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure cultural Knowledge Holders inform the decision-making process to determine the cultural significance of places.

pcs.text: Acknowledge traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander knowledge, practices, rights and responsibilities in managing Country and environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Acknowledge traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander knowledge, practices, rights and responsibilities in managing Country and environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Acknowledge traditional Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander knowledge, practices, rights and responsibilities in managing Country and environment.

pcs.text: Research and document scientific, aesthetic and historical elements of a place to determine cultural significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and document scientific, aesthetic and historical elements of a place to determine cultural significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and document scientific, aesthetic and historical elements of a place to determine cultural significance.

pcs.text: Determine the Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs embedded in a place of cultural significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs embedded in a place of cultural significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs embedded in a place of cultural significance.

pcs.text: Assess and document cultural significance according to local Community permissions and intellectual property protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and document cultural significance according to local Community permissions and intellectual property protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and document cultural significance according to local Community permissions and intellectual property protocols.

pcs.text: Ensure research and assessment activities are conducted in a manner that is safe to self and others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure research and assessment activities are conducted in a manner that is safe to self and others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure research and assessment activities are conducted in a manner that is safe to self and others.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record evidence of land degradation using standard industry and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander terminology.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply safe and environmentally sustainable work practices.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement conservation activities in culturally sensitive ways, according to local Community, organisational and legislative requirements.
